shots.reasoning_brief: Visual-only shot establishing scene with mother and child in foreground; no dialogue or props.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_PARENT
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 这个人怎么进的星辉？赞助费一年二十万，她穿得像刚从菜市场来的。

shots.reasoning_brief: Speaker is windcoat mom addressing friend; action targets none; visible is speaker only in mid-shot context.
Visual-only reaction and action shot; Shen Niange hears and tightens grip on child; no dialogue.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: 沈知予
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，你在想什么？

shots.reasoning_brief: Child speaks to mother while looking up; visible characters mother-child pair.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: 沈念歌
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 在想予予今天要好好表现。

shots.reasoning_brief: Mother responds to child with smile; foreground duo.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: 沈知予
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 放心吧！我最厉害了！

shots.reasoning_brief: Child boasts to mother; visible pair in sequence.
Scene transition to classroom; multiple children/parents in circle, but foreground teacher and key characters; visual-only.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 今天是我们中班的第一天，请小朋友们轮流做自我介绍好不好？先说名字，再说一个关于自己的秘密。

shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher addresses group of children; listener is children collectively.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: 沈知予
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 大家好，我叫沈知予。小名予予。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child introduces self to class; visible child standing.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 予予的秘密是什么呀？

shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher questions child directly.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: 沈知予
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我爸爸是这个城市最厉害的人。但我还没见过他。等我找到他，他会变得很厉害。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child shares secret with class; serious delivery.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 予予的爸爸一定很了不起。那你有没有什么爱好呢？

shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher responds gently to child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: 沈知予
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我喜欢画画。还有数学。100以内的加减法我都能算。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child answers teacher about hobbies.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 真的吗？那老师考考你。37加58等于多少？

shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher tests child; visual includes child reacting.
Child answers math quickly.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: 沈知予
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 这个很简单呀。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child comments innocently to group.
Scene change to evening; visual-only mother waiting, child running out.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: 沈知予
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪！今天老师说我是全班最聪明的！还给我多发了一颗小星星！

shots.reasoning_brief: Child excitedly tells mother.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: 沈念歌
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 真棒。

shots.reasoning_brief: Mother praises while adjusting backpack; action on child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: 沈知予
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，我告诉你一个秘密。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child whispers secret to mother.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: 沈念歌
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 什么秘密？

shots.reasoning_brief: Mother asks child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: 沈知予
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我今天在幼儿园走廊上看到一张照片。挂在荣誉墙上。一个穿西装的男人，下面写着'陆氏集团总裁陆景琛先生捐赠'。妈咪——就是医院的那个叔叔！
dialogue_annotations.gaze_rule: 左右看了看，凑到她耳边

shots.reasoning_brief: Child reveals photo observation to mother; prop PHOTO_01 mentioned but not handed off.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: 沈念歌
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 嗯……可能是吧。

shots.reasoning_brief: Mother responds evasively; no prop handoff from previous photo mention.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: 沈知予
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我就知道！他就住在这个城市！妈咪，你今天不是去他上班的地方了吗？你有没有看到他？

shots.reasoning_brief: Child questions mother excitedly.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: 沈念歌
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 走了，公交车来了。

shots.reasoning_brief: Mother changes subject.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: 沈知予
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，他既然捐赠了幼儿园，说明他是个好人。好人的话，应该不会不认自己的儿子吧？
dialogue_annotations.gaze_rule: 被牵着上了车，还在回头看着幼儿园的方向

shots.reasoning_brief: Child persists while being led to bus.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: 陆景琛
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 查到了吗？

shots.reasoning_brief: Phone call from Lu to assistant; visible implied as off-screen speaker.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: 赵一鸣
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 查到了。陆总，那个孩子……确实在星辉。今天第一天入园。

shots.reasoning_brief: Assistant reports to boss on phone.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: 陆景琛
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 他今天说了什么？

shots.reasoning_brief: Boss inquires further on phone.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: 赵一鸣
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 他说……'我爸爸是这个城市最厉害的人。但还没见过他。'

shots.reasoning_brief: Assistant relays child's words hesitantly.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: 陆景琛
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: ……知道了。

shots.reasoning_brief: Boss acknowledges softly on phone.

music_cues: 吉他轻拨，一丝暖意中带着悬念
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual-only closing shot with music cue; no dialogue or props.
